title: T4U Glass Plant Mister 200ML, Vintage Spray Bottle with Top Pump, Fine Mist Garden Flower Sprayer Small Decorative Spritzer Watering Can Gift for Indoor Outdoor Succulent House Plant (Green)
features: |Small Body with Huge Energy| - 200ml/7oz small body provides adequate water for indoor house plants like succulent, cactus, herb and aloe, etc. Flower plants grow up healthily with its daily company.

|Easy and Comfortable to Use| - Just fill it up with water and press down the pump gently, fine mist sprayed out smoothly. Designed with a soft finger handle, plant misting being more enjoyable.Tip: If the nozzle dripping water does not fog phenomenon, may be the nozzle is loose, just tighten it.

|Vintage Style Decoration| - Nordic vintage style pressure mister, lovely and charming, adding a simple but classic touch to your living space. It's not doubt a perfect decor to modern home and garden.

|Premium Glass Plant Mister| - Thick glass spray bottle with sturdy plastic top pump prevents rust and fading color. Clear to see the water level, this plant sprayer will look as good as new even after frequent use.
|Good Dainty Helper| - It's not only an excellent assistant on small gardening and general house cleaning but a cute companion for kids to learn about plant caring.
